channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ENVAIREL] Envair Electrodyne Gets In-Principle Approval for ₹136.87 Cr CCL Project
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Envair Electrodyne Ltd has received in-principle approval for its Copper Clad Laminate (CCL) manufacturing project in Odisha. The project, with an investment of ₹136.87 Crores, was approved by the Industrial Promotion & Investment Corporation of Odisha Limited (IPICOL) on May 4, 2026. The approval is subject to terms and conditions, with a project timeline of 2 years, subject to final order.

  • Envair Electrodyne receives in-principle approval for CCL manufacturing.
  • Project investment is valued at ₹136.87 Crores.
  • IPICOL granted the approval on May 4, 2026.
  • Project timeline is estimated at 2 years.
  • Approval is subject to terms and conditions and final order.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ENVAIR ELECTRODYNE LTD. | Category: Project Update

item.title: [DAPS] DAPS Advertising Board to Consider Dividend
item.description:
The Board of Directors of DAPS Advertising Limited is scheduled to meet on May 8, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the half-year and year ended March 31, 2026, and to consider the recommendation of a dividend for the financial year 2025-2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until May 10, 2026.

  • DAPS Advertising board meeting on May 8, 2026, to consider dividend.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 will be reviewed.
  • Trading window closed until May 10, 2026.
  • Meeting is in compliance with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DAPS Advertising Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HUBTOWN] Hubtown Receives NCLT Order for Merger with 25 West Realty
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Hubtown Ltd announced the receipt of an order from the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Mumbai Bench, regarding the proposed scheme of arrangement for the merger/amalgamation of 25 West Realty Private Limited (Transferee Company) with Hubtown Limited (Transferor Company). The NCLT order, dated May 04, 2026, directs Hubtown to convene a meeting of its equity shareholders to consider and approve the scheme. The company will separately update the precise details of the equity shareholders meeting. The NCLT order has been uploaded on the company's website.

  • NCLT approves meeting for Hubtown's merger with 25 West Realty.
  • Equity shareholders to convene to consider the merger scheme.
  • Merger aims at internal reorganization within the promoter group.
  • 25 West Realty is developing a super-luxury residential project in Mumbai.
  • The appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HUBTOWN LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [ADJIA] Adjia Technologies Approves Audited Financial Results for FY26
item.description:
Adjia Technologies Ltd's board approved the audited standalone financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, following a meeting on May 4, 2026. The audit was conducted by Shubham Jain & Co., Chartered Accountants, who provided an independent auditor's report. The trading window has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of financial results, in compliance with SEBI regulations.

  • Adjia Technologies approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • Board meeting was held on May 4, 2026, to approve results.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
  • Audited results reviewed and recommended by the Audit Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Adjia Technologies Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SOFTBPO] Softbpo Global Services Rebrands as IDream Film Infra
item.description:
Softbpo Global Services Ltd has changed its name to IDream Film Infrastructure Company Limited, effective May 7, 2026, as per BSE notice. The company's Scrip ID has been revised from SOFTBPO to IDREAM, and the abbreviated name on the BOLT Plus System has been updated accordingly.

  • Softbpo Global Services Ltd changes name to IDream Film Infrastructure Company Limited.
  • Name change effective on BSE's BOLT Plus System from May 7, 2026.
  • Scrip ID revised from SOFTBPO to IDREAM.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SOFTBPO GLOBAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Rebranding

item.title: [CAMS] CAMS: Audited Results for Quarter and Year Ended March 31, 2026
item.description:
Computer Age Management Services Ltd (CAMS) has announced its audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved the results and recommended a dividend of ₹4.00 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval at the Annual General Meeting (AGM) scheduled for July 7, 2026. If approved, the dividend will be paid to shareholders on record as of July 10, 2026, with disbursement on or before August 5, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of Ranga Rao & Co as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-2027 and approved investments in CAMS Financial Information Services Private Limited and acquisitions in Fintuple Technologies and Think Analytics India.

  • Approved audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Recommended a dividend of ₹4.00 per equity share, pending shareholder approval.
  • Approved the appointment of Ranga Rao & Co as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-2027.
  • Approved investment of up to ₹20 crores in CAMS Financial Information Services Private Limited.
  • Approved acquisitions of shares in Fintuple Technologies and Think Analytics India.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Computer Age Management Services Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [WOSAL] Western Overseas MD Pardeep Balyan Receives Excellence Award
item.description:
Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd announced that its Managing Director, Mr. Pardeep Balyan, has been conferred with the “Excellence Award in Study Visa and Immigration 2026” at an event organized by MY FM. The award was presented by Bollywood actor Mr. Jimmy Shergill. This recognition highlights Mr. Balyan's leadership and the company's commitment to excellence in overseas education consultancy and immigration services, enhancing the company's brand value and credibility.

  • Mr. Pardeep Balyan, MD of Western Overseas, receives 'Excellence Award in Study Visa and Immigration 2026'.
  • The award enhances the company's brand value and credibility in the market.
  • Recognition reflects the company's commitment to quality services in overseas education.
  • Award strengthens the company's position and future growth prospects.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Western Overseas Study Abroad Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [SELAN] Antelopus Selan Energy FY26: PAT up 27% to ₹89.6 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Antelopus Selan Energy Ltd reported its FY26 annual results, showcasing volume-driven growth despite a challenging pricing environment. Average sales surged c.48% to 684 boepd, with Feb & Mar '26 monthly sales at 1,000+ boepd and an exit rate of 1800+ boepd. The company achieved EBITDA of ₹167.5 Cr (up c.14%) with a 59% margin, and Profit After Tax of ₹89.6 Cr (up c.27%). The company is targeting 2,500 boepd in FY’27, entirely self-funded.

  • FY'26 average sales grew to 1,355 boepd, with significant impact from Q3 FY'26.
  • EBITDA increased by c.14% to ₹167.5 Cr with a 59% margin.
  • Profit After Tax rose by c.27% to ₹89.6 Cr.
  • Exit rate of 1800+ boepd achieved in Feb & Mar '26.
  • Targeting 2,500 boepd in FY’27, self-funded.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SELAN EXPLORATION TECHNOLOGY LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SYRMA] Syrma SGS Board Meeting on May 11, 2026 to Consider Results & Dividend
item.description:
Syrma SGS Technology Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 11, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend a dividend, if any, on equity shares for the same financial year. The trading window remains closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Syrma SGS board meeting scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • Board to consider FY26 audited financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered at the meeting.
  • Trading window closed until 48 hours post results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Syrma SGS Technology Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [STDSFAC] Standard Surfactants: Fire Incident at Mandideep Plant
item.description:
🔥 Trending

A fire incident occurred at Standard Surfactants Ltd's Spray Drier Plant (SPD) in Mandideep on May 3, 2026. Operations at the affected plant will be temporarily shut down for 2-3 months for re-installation. No casualties or injuries were reported. The company is assessing the extent of the damage and has notified the insurance company. Other manufacturing operations remain unaffected. The asset is adequately insured, and an insurance survey is expected.

  • Fire incident at Standard Surfactants' Mandideep plant on May 3, 2026.
  • SPD plant operations temporarily suspended for 2-3 months.
  • No casualties or injuries reported; damage assessment underway.
  • Asset is insured, and the insurance company has been notified.
  • Other manufacturing operations remain unaffected.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: STANDARD SURFACTANTS LTD. | Category: Business Update
